nodes.title: Prompt 1
widgets_values: Two muscular women in a school locker room, one with green hair and the other with purple spiky locks. The woman with purple hair is restrained by chains attached to blue lockers behind her while she arches backward slightly under pressure from her partner's firm grip on her hip. Her body glistens with sweat as she leans forward into a passionate kiss initiated by the girl in green, whose hand rests possessively against her thigh and backside. The background features rows of identical steel-blue lockers stretching out behind them, creating an enclosed atmosphere that amplifies their intimate moment.

nodes.title: Prompt 4
widgets_values: By now, both figures are fully locked together with synchronized movements: hips rolling forward then backward like waves crashing against each other. The locker room becomes almost secondary to their heated exchange — every glance exchanged between them holds meaning beyond words spoken aloud or unspoken at all; the air vibrates around them as if charged electricity itself.

nodes.title: Prompt 3
widgets_values: In a sudden burst of energy — perhaps triggered by their escalating intimacy or external stimuli — the woman pinned against the lockers lifts slightly off the ground. Her legs wrap around her companion’s waist as she pulls closer still; fingers dig into skin, nails grazing lightly along curves while beads of sweat drip down from raised brows and parted lips soaked in anticipation.

nodes.title: Prompt 2
widgets_values: The scene evolves from intense stillness to dynamic motion — both women are now moving rhythmically together as if dancing or grinding in unison within the confines of this locker room space filled with echoes and faint sounds. Their expressions shift subtly: one eyes half-closed in pleasure while her partner’s gaze locks onto hers, conveying mutual desire even through closed eyelids that suggest deep emotional connection beyond physical contact alone.
